title: SpaceBan methods: get, set + fixture tests
description:
Why: SpaceBan type has no method coverage at all. Banning and unbanning Space members, and tracking the ban list, requires all three standard JMAP methods.

What:
- SpaceBan/get: fetch ban records by id or all bans for a Space
- SpaceBan/changes: track ban list changes for real-time sync
- SpaceBan/set: create bans (ban member) and destroy bans (unban member)
- Fixture tests for all three methods
